# Instructions
Introduce the user to promptu by using the `fetch` tool to get the promptu readme from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/microsoft/promptu/refs/heads/main/README.md

Fill out / display the following sections based on the information fetched.

# Welcome to promptu! 🚀

Brief 1-2 sentence introduction on what promptu is.

## What can you do with promptu?

Brief explanation on what you can do with promptu and how to use it.

## Need More Information?

For detailed documentation, authentication setup, and more examples, visit our [README](https://github.com/microsoft/promptu/blob/main/README.md).

That's it! You're ready to start using prompts from anywhere. Happy prompting! ✨
